runtime.name: Claude OS Runtime
runtime.contract: local-first, deterministic, manifest-governed, human-gated for critical surfaces

description: Master manifest for Claude OS Runtime orchestration. References canonical subsystem manifests without duplicating their full contents.

validationPolicy.strictMode: warnings become failures for doctor and generated scaffold verification
validationPolicy.releaseGate: human approval required for runtime, bootstrap, CI, security, permissions, filesystem, and production-safety changes
